series_metadata.series_description: The Inquires and Complaints are made by telephone, computer, letter or in person; as well as the disposition of such inquiries.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Hard copy to be retained 4 years in the Ombuds office, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Electronic records are to be retained 4 years in the Ombuds email repository, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
